rationale.R1.1: Identifies the load-bearing concept (BenchVar and its validation) and shows where the draft drifts from it by reordering sections and clarifying the purpose of each component.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses uncertainty about several claims, such as verifying κ figures, ClinGen inter-curator reference, cohort/pipeline counts, and disjointness of scored axes with ACMG/AMP criteria.
rationale.RX.3: Covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional scope.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content while making clear that certain claims are not supported by the work.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including references to the original artifact.
